acceptance_criteria.text: Backend exposes scoped recent Operator refresh jobs for a business/user.
Refresh jobs include statuses `processing`, `completed`, and `failed`, plus new review and unanswered counts.
proof: `list_refresh_jobs` normalizes job status and aggregates counts.

acceptance_criteria.text: Operator dashboard shows refresh history with status, check-result action, new review snippets, and transition to reply generation.
proof: The new `Обновления отзывов` section renders status, snippets, `Проверить результат`, `Открыть отзывы`, and `Подготовить ответы`.
gaps: Authenticated browser inspection was not possible locally; unauthenticated route redirected to login.

acceptance_criteria.text: The feature reuses the existing refresh result and reply generation flows without adding external map writes or publication.
proof: Backend reads only `parsequeue` and saved reviews.

acceptance_criteria.text: Documentation and proof artifacts describe the Sprint 36 boundary.
proof: Updated Operator docs, agent index, and tool registry.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_fresh_reviews.py tests/test_operator_apify_settlement.py tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py
known_gaps: Authenticated browser inspection was not available locally; unauthenticated `/dashboard/operator` redirected to login.
